dict.string: Publish Menu, Remove Menu and Make Device Squeak scripts for Salling Clicker
Provides a way to use several notifiers at once
Adds user accounts to the catalog and a fast user switch action
Provides access to AcidSearch channels as queries
Adds Address Book contacts and actions for showing them. Contact info is available as children of contacts.
Adds AirPort networks to the catalog.
Adds a catalog source for AirPort networks as well as actions for selecting them and internal commands disabling Airport (Beta)
Enables email actions for Apple Mail
Enables email actions for Apple Mail. Allows browsing mailboxes as children of Mail (beta)
Support For Workflows and Automator Actions
Shortcuts to Backpack Pages - Adds a new catalog entry source. Pages have an email address that can be used to append to them with the Email Modules
Allows Bluetooth Dialing of Phone Numbers
Reveal contacts with BuddyPop. Requires BuddyPop 2.0
Upload text or files to cl1p.com
Allows clipboard recording and adds a clipboard history window.
Allows clipboard recording and adds a clipboard history window.
Allows data to be piped into Quicksilver from the command line
Stores and loads artwork from the common music archive
Provides basic file and URL handling
Provides support and actions for basic types such as files, strings, and URLs.
A rotating cube interface with a variety of options
Provides access to del.icio.us and ma.gnolia bookmarks
Provides access to del.icio.us and ma.gnolia bookmarks
Allows you to link the current desktop to any folder, effectively swapping the items on your desktop.

Allows you to link the current desktop to any folder, effectively swapping the items on your desktop. To restore the original desktop, use the action on the "Desktop (disabled)" folder in your home folder.
Adds a Define action to strings to fetch the definition from dict.org
Allows modification of resolution and depth of main display.
Enables email actions for Entourage. Preliminary access to contacts in v2004.
A set of system Shell/AppleScripts that emulate some OS functions like restarting and process actions.
File locking, labeling and visibility actions
Modify and find tags in file comments
Alows the Finder to respond to Open/Reveal/Selection actions.

Bookmarks for Firefox & Mozilla

Enhancements


  • Adds a new preset to the Catalog that imports bookmarks from Firefox, Mozilla, and Netscape
  • Allows Firefox to handle javascript bookmarklets
Upload images or directories to flickr
Actions to scale and change format of images

Actions to scale and change format of images

use the "scale image" action and give it text in the form:
"SCALE_INFO [as FORMAT_INFO]"
SCALE_INFO: "[fit] WIDTH [x HEIGHT]"
FORMAT_INFO: "JPG/PNG/GIF/TIFF [low/med*/hi*] [prog(ressive)] [inter(laced)]"

Examples:
"fit 640x480 as jpg high progressive" - creates an image that will fit within a 640x480 rectangle
"50% as interlaced png" - creates a png with dimensions half of the original"
"x72 as gif" - makes a gif 72 pixels tall, with width to maintain the proportions
Allows triggering with hot corners and edges of the main screen
Bookmarks, History, Search Queries, and Proxy Object.
Handles open, reveal, info, and selection actions in Path Finder
Actions for monitoring and modifying application processes on your machine.
Adds Radial Menu Actions to Quicksilver
Remote Desktop Access, for now only supports control, observe, and desktop.
Adds the ability to interact with Subversion Repositories.

Adds the ability to interact with Subversion Repositories.

Requirements

This plugin requires the svn command to be accessable at /usr/local/bin. Subversion can be downloaded at metissian.org

Instructions

To use specify a path in QS and then pick svn commands from the action menu. Detailed instructions are available for more help.
Provides access to SafariStand QuickSearches as queries
A set of actions that allow capturing the screen
Converts entries from the Services menu into actions
Provides a shelf for temporary storage
Provides an action to show images in a slideshow

Provides a slideshow action

Enhancements

  • Adds a "Slideshow" action that works on images, a pdf, or a folder
Provides access to Sogudi shortcuts as queries

Spotlight actions and integration

Enhancements


  • Spotlight Query Catalog Entry, currently pretty rough.
  • Search in Spotlight Window Action
  • Spotlight Search in Folder Action (internally or through Finder)
  • Spotlight Search for Filenames Action
Allows triggering of Exposé and other System Hotkeys
Adds a catalog entry for Exposé and Dashboard commands. For these to work, keyboard activation in Exposé system preferences must be set to F1-F13 (with or without modifiers).
Allows running of shell scripts in Quicksilver or the Terminal
Actions for appending text to files

Favorites Access & Uploading

Enhancements

  • Adds Transmit favorites to catalog
  • Favorites contain links to all the remote sidebar locations
  • An upload action allows sending files to favorites or their sidebar links

Version Changes

  • Sidebar links are now accessible
Access the menus of running applications.

Access the menus of running applications.

Requirements


  • Access for assistive devices must be enabled in Universal Access pane of System Preferences
A QuickSilver module for working with VoodooPad
A plugin to append and prepend text or create entries in a dashboard wiki
Adds actions for creating events and to-dos from text.
Provides access to playlists and allows browsing by Artist, Album, Genre, and Composer.

Provides access to playlists and allows browsing by Artist, Album, Genre, and Composer.

Enhancements


  • Playlists and Browsing groups in catalog and as children of iTunes
  • Party Shuffle and Play actions
  • Display notifications on track changes
  • Adds control scripts for playing, pausing, skipping tracks
Set the desktop picture of any display to a file, folder, or URL.

Cyberduck Plug-in

Prerequisites

Cyberduck

Usage

To see a list of Cyberduck bookmarks:

  • Find the 'Cyberduck' object (representing the application) and right-arrow into it.

Acknowledgements

  • David V. Kocher
  • ilovja
  • jacobolus
Unit conversions via the units(1) command

Miscellaneous unit conversions

Examples

  • 1 mile Convert to Units... km
  • 1 floz Convert to Units... cm3
  • 32 ft/sec^2 Convert to Units... m/sec^2
  • c Convert to Units... mph

Warning: the space between the quantity and the units is required. units(1) is not flexible enough to handle input without the space. Lame, isn't it?

Usage

Use the 'Convert to Units...' action to convert a quantity with units to use another set of units:

  • Specify the source unit-spec (quantity with units) via text-entry mode
  • Choose the Convert To Units... action
  • Specify the target unit-spec via text-entry mode

A unit-spec is either:

  • a quantity, space and a unit (e.g 10 m) or
  • just a unit (e.g. m)

units can be complex using multiplication, division, and exponents. See the units(1) man page for details but here is a summary.

units(1) understands most familiar units and constants and their abbreviations, however to avoid misinterpretation sometimes the abbreviations aren't obvious. E.g., "g" isn't gram but the acceleration of gravity constant (gm is gram), and oz and floz are different. See the file /usr/share/misc/units.lib for everything that units(1) understands.

Miscellaneous Notes

  • Seeing an error? Do you have a space between your quantity and units?
  • For detailed (but often unhelpful) error messages see Console.app
  • units(1) doesn't do temperature conversions
  • units(1) will do currency conversions but the rates are from the early 1990s

Acknowledgements

  • Adrian Mariano (author of version of units shipped with Mac OS X)
  • gary
  • Howard Melman
  • jacobolus
  • Kevin Ballard
  • Nicholas Jitkoff
  • ProcrasT8
  • thebarty
  • yelly

iTerm Support

Warning

This is alpha software. Use at your own risk.

Prerequisites

  • iTerm

Usage

To use iTerm as the Handler/Helper for the command line interface:

  1. Bring up the Quicksilver Preferences window.
  2. Choose the 'Handlers' pane.
  3. Choose 'iTerm' for 'Command Line Interface'.

Now the following actions should use iTerm:

  • Go To Directory in Terminal
  • Run a Text Command in Terminal
  • Run in Terminal [...]

The plug-in also provides iTerm-specific version of the above commands:

  • Go To Directory in iTerm
  • Run a Text Command in iTerm
  • Run in iTerm [...]
  • Show Man Page [1]

These commands may be used regardless of the Handler/Helper command line interface setting.

[1] 'Show Man Page' does not appear to be handled by the mediator.

Known Issues and Notes

  • Escaping of arguments may be iffy.
  • If iTerm is running but there are no windows, iTerm actions may not work.
  • Execution of a command in the first tab in iTerm is not supported yet.
  • The iTerm version of 'Show Man Page' behaves a little differently than the corresponding Terminal action -- exiting the man command does not end the shell session.

Acknowledgements

  • Adam Ratcliffe
Allows calculation of mathematical expressions with the Calculate action
Plugin to make Quicksilver aware of Eclipse workspaces.

A plugin that indexes Eclipse workspaces and contributes them along with their log files to the catalog.

  • Project Home: http://code.google.com/p/qseclipse/
  • Documentation: http://code.google.com/p/qseclipse/w/list
Ranking which prefers word boundaries. Change the default ranker in the Handlers preferences.
Provides access to Interarchy Bookmarks and Net Disks. Allows you to open bookmarks; upload files and folders to bookmarks; and mount, unmount, and sync Net Disks.

Provides access to Interarchy Bookmarks and Net Disks. Allows you to open Bookmarks; upload files and folders to Bookmarks; and mount, unmount, and sync Net Disks.

Enhancements

  • Bookmarks and Net Disks in catalogue and as children of Interarchy.
  • Open Bookmark action for opening Bookmarks.
  • Run Bookmark action for running Bookmarks in the background.
  • Upload action for uploading files and folders.
  • Mount, Unmount, and Sync actions for managing Net Disks.

Version Changes

  • Bookmarks and Net Disks are now available as children of Interarchy.
  • Run Bookmark action for running Bookmarks in the background.
  • Bookmarks Bar Bookmarks are now available too.

Requirements

  • Interarchy 8.5 or later.
